$comment: Machine-readable surface for a future /apply-pattern installer. Human spec: patterns/multi-tenant-isolation/pattern.md. Expressed AS an invariant cluster (see docs/patterns-registry.md#patterns-as-clusters-of-invariants). Promoted from candidate to specified; the saas-infra isolation floor.
title: Multi-Tenant Isolation Stack
applies_when: more than one customer/organization shares a datastore
a single missed scope or an accepted client-supplied tenant key is a full data breach
you want isolation PROVEN by a standing test, not asserted in review
stamp it FIRST, before features that depend on the isolation floor
components: server-only-tenant-resolution: tenant derived from the authenticated principal; client-supplied tenant rejected (400); anti-probe 404 for wrong actor class
fail-closed-scoped-repo: every read/write resolves tenant from context first, ErrMissingTenant if absent; no unscoped path exists; AND-wrapped filters; auto-inject on insert
reject-dont-override-recursive: caller-supplied tenant key anywhere (nested arrays, replacement docs, pipeline stages, $rename string VALUES) rejected (ErrTenantOverride), never silently replaced
unexported-store-handles: raw collection handle unexported so callers cannot bypass the scoped repo
operator-plane-out-of-band: admin routes register OUTSIDE tenant middleware; system identity orthogonal to the tenant graph, not a super-role in it
standing-proof-gate: permanent CI test; positive controls + negative matrix (read/write/token/header/id-in-url) each asserting denial AND no-mutation AND no-foreign-id-leak

cancel-latched-cascade-erasure: settle external obligations (billing) outside+before the datastore wipe; erase all tenant collections in one transaction; resumable/fail-closed; documented tombstone exception for tax/legal retention

invariants.$comment: The cluster this pattern guarantees. Generic ids are the pattern's own; realized_as cites the provenance app's app-specific id + code.

cluster.statement: Fail-closed scoping: every repo method resolves tenant from context first, errors if absent; no unscoped path exists.
Reject-don't-override: a caller-supplied tenant key anywhere (incl. $rename string values, nested arrays) is rejected; key auto-injected on insert.
Server-only resolution: client hints rejected (400); anti-probe 404 for wrong actor class.
Operator plane out-of-band: admin routes register OUTSIDE tenant middleware; provider token can't reach /admin/*, admin token can't ride provider routes.
Standing cross-tenant proof gate: asserts denial AND no-mutation AND no-foreign-id-in-denial across every vector.
Cancel-latched resumable transactional cascade erasure with a documented tombstone exception (billing cancelled outside+before the wipe; tax snapshots survive).

resolver.description: How the tenant is derived from the authenticated principal.

store.description: Datastore the scoped repo wraps; raw handles kept unexported.

operator_routes.description: Route prefix(es) that register outside tenant middleware.

erasure_external_obligations.description: External systems (billing) settled before the wipe.

metrics.desc: any read/write reaching another tenant's data (target 0; proof-gate asserted)
code paths touching the store outside the fail-closed scoped repo (target 0)
fraction of tenant-scoped collections/vectors covered by the standing proof gate

feeds.elevated-access-session: provides the out-of-band operator plane an impersonated session is denied from
feeds.improvement-loop: the floor that makes mining per-tenant behavioral signal safe (read across tenants only atop fail-closed scoping)
feeds.tiered-subscription: per-tenant billing state is projected onto the tenant record; erasure settles billing before wipe
